subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! His honour Furúghí hath sent a letter mentioning the names of those beloved friends of heart and soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء جناب فروغی مکتوبی ارسال نمود و ذکر اسماء آن یاران دل و جان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consultation, @banishments of Baha'u'llah
